steps.t: Skálo and the Dourhand prisoner can be found at Grúmachath in Câr Bronach. After capturing a Dourhand warrior, Mézto hopes to undermine the Iron Crown…
Skálo can be found at Grúmachath. You have found Skálo and the Dourhand prisoner at Grúmachath. You should talk to Skálo.
Rethvárd can be found at Grúmachath. After finding little success questioning his prisoner, Skálo has invited you to speak to Rethvárd. You should tal…
Rethvárd can be found at Grúmachath. You have aided Rethvárd and hindered the Iron Crown in their efforts to raise the Dead of Câr Bronach. You should…
Skálo can be found at Grúmachath. After returning from the tasks Rethvárd set for you, you have found Skálo wounded and Rethvárd is nowhere to be foun…
